TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Cu ki ngo = Gaga mniq Taytung Kwansancn ka alang Cu ki ngo. 337 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 843 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 16% niqan 134 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 84% niqan 709 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis13%, Bunun2%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = ʦu ki ŋo = gaga mniq tajtuŋ kwansanʦn ka alaŋ ʦu ki ŋo. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Cu ki ngo = Gaga mniq Taytung Kwansancn ka alang Cu ki ngo. 337 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 843 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 16% niqan 134 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 84% niqan 709 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis13%, Bunun2%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = ʦu ki ŋo = gaga mniq tajtuŋ kwansanʦn ka alaŋ ʦu ki ŋo. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%. pnjaħan pnatas
